final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still mockup of a TikTok (Douyin) live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a celestial beauty ("神仙姐姐").

Style/medium: screenshot UI mockup, live-stream interface
Composition: 9:16 vertical, subject holding a sign facing camera
Subject: a young woman ("神仙姐姐") holding a handwritten sign during a live broadcast
Scene/backdrop: Douyin / TikTok live-stream interface with on-screen UI overlays (viewer count, comments, like icons)
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: sign text must read exactly "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"; include typical Douyin live-stream UI elements
Avoid:
